{{Quote|Master-com, see to this ''mess'' immediately. And instruct all servo-droids to be ''careful'' what's left laying around.|Simon Greyshade|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 20">[[Star Wars (1977) 20|''Star Wars'' (1977) 20]]</ref>}}
'''Servo-droids''' were small, simple [[Droid/Legends|droids]] which cleaned messes on [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 20|''Star Wars'' (1977) 20]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 20}} {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars (1977) 89|''Star Wars'' (1977) 89]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 89}} {{Mo}}
*''[[Tatooine Ghost]]''
